decisions.title: Use typed Forge updates
decisions.detail: Structured mutations should stay explicit instead of acting like loose patches.

observations.summary: Small fixture keeps one baseline observation.

habits.description: Write the next step at session close.

issues.title: Need explicit issue resolution flow
issues.detail: The benchmark fixture expects resolution metadata to be stored together.

driftLog.summary: Working view phrasing might drift from the plan.
driftLog.detail: Use this as a small continuity baseline.
driftLog.recommendedAction: Record the conflict and revisit the relevant plan or decision before the next major change.

concerns.title: Keep continuity concise
concerns.detail: Forge should summarize without over-narrating routine actions.

session.nextStep: Resume with the remaining open issue.
